name: linear
description: Linear integration. List/search/create/update issues, add comments, manage teams. Optional webhook listener for agent session events.

config.name: api_key
config.description: Linear API key (personal or OAuth token)

config.name: team_id
config.description: Default Linear team ID (required for creating issues)

config.name: webhook_port
config.description: Port for Linear webhook listener. Enables webhook mode when set.

config.name: webhook_secret
config.description: Linear webhook signing secret for HMAC verification

config.name: webhook_agent
config.description: Default agent name to route webhook sessions to (overrides routing)

config.name: bot_user_id
config.description: Linear user ID of the bot account. Prevents infinite webhook loops by ignoring the bot's own comments.

config.name: mention_trigger
config.description: String that must appear in a comment to trigger the bot (default: @bot)
